context: Team composition for discovery/audit task
reasoning: Component library has no backend/data/infra — only needs scout + architect (config) + frontend (components)
owner_stated_reason: n/a — auto-selected
outcome: successful — 3 agents covered all domains efficiently

context: Phase 5 forwardRef+rest+hooks across 55 components
reasoning: Split by category for parallelism (3 frontend by category + core for hooks/barrel + infra for CI)
owner_stated_reason: Owner said 'давай все, используй team agents'
outcome: successful — 72 files modified, 0 conflicts between agents. 2 agents left stale default exports (minor).

reasoning: Owner preference when asked directly
owner_stated_reason: 'го пока что GitHub Packages'
outcome: successful — @ansoragroup/ui@0.1.1 published to GitHub Packages

context: @nutui/nutui-react and @nutui/icons-react causing peer dep conflicts
reasoning: grep found 0 imports from nutui in src/ — packages completely unused
owner_stated_reason: n/a — agent discovered and removed
outcome: successful — clean npm install without --legacy-peer-deps

context: GitHub Packages requires scope matching org name
reasoning: GitHub Packages mandates @org/name scope. Org is ansoragroup.
owner_stated_reason: agreed to GitHub Packages which requires this
outcome: successful — @ansoragroup/ui published

context: i18n architecture for component library
reasoning: 75+ hardcoded strings across 20+ components. Props-only would add ~5 props per component. Context with prop override matches existing useControllableState philosophy.
owner_stated_reason: Owner requested multi-language and multi-currency support
outcome: successful — 23 components migrated, 0 breaking changes, works without provider

context: Price formatting for multi-currency
reasoning: Intl.NumberFormat with style:'currency' produces inconsistent UZS output across browsers. Using grouping-only mode + manual symbol placement preserves current behavior.
owner_stated_reason: n/a — technical decision
outcome: successful — consistent formatting across UZS/USD/RUB/EUR

context: Where to place Storybook documentation pages
reasoning: src/docs/ keeps docs separate from component stories, covered by existing Storybook glob, not included in npm build
owner_stated_reason: Owner requested design system documentation in Storybook
outcome: successful — 7 pages created, sidebar groups work

context: Building 20 components + 10 pages + 7 docs simultaneously
reasoning: Each agent owns exclusive directories. Split by domain: form, commerce, feedback/data-display, pages, docs, auth. Zero conflict risk.
owner_stated_reason: Owner wanted comprehensive execution, all P0+P1 at once
outcome: successful — 160 files, 469 tests, 0 conflicts. 1 import path error fixed.

context: Theme presets not working because components used SCSS vars
reasoning: $color-primary compiles to hardcoded #FF5000. CSS custom properties are runtime-changeable.
owner_stated_reason: Owner reported theme switcher doesn't work
outcome: successful — 38 files migrated, all themes work at runtime

context: Themes only changed primary color, price/success/etc stayed default
reasoning: Partial theming looks broken. Each preset needs harmonized palette across all 16 semantic colors.
owner_stated_reason: Owner said themes look half-done, colors don't match
outcome: successful — 6 presets each have 16 harmonized colors

context: How to implement Desktop versions — CQ extensions vs separate Desktop* components
reasoning: Owner explicitly requested Desktop* versions of ALL components. CQ extensions would share code but limit desktop-specific layouts (multi-column, sidebars, hover states). Separate components allow genuinely different layouts inspired by Taobao/Dewu/1688.
owner_stated_reason: Owner explicitly said create Desktop* versions, not just wider mobile. See feedback_desktop_only_components.md
alternatives_considered: container query extensions of mobile components
outcome: successful — 90 Desktop components created with desktop-native layouts

context: Desktop header design — explored 3 variants (Minimal, Rich, Glass)
reasoning: Rich (Ozon-style) header provides best UX for e-commerce: multi-row with top bar, search, categories. Minimal too sparse for feature-rich store. Glass visually striking but readability concerns over varied backgrounds.
owner_stated_reason: Owner reviewed all 3 variants via Storybook screenshots
outcome: successful — Rich selected as primary, all 3 available as variants in DesktopHeader component

context: Owner deleted all 3 DesktopHomePage variants (A, B, C)
reasoning: All 3 variants did not match the visual quality of Uzum/Ozon/Alifshop references. Owner wanted to start from scratch with proper design system tokens and real product images.
owner_stated_reason: Owner explicitly deleted all 3 and demanded redesign matching Uzum/Ozon pixel-level
outcome: successful — new DesktopHomePage created with design system overhaul, real product images, proper card styling

context: Preparing component library for Next.js SSR deployment
reasoning: Components need 'use client' directives (first line), CSS vars for server rendering (no runtime JS for styles), as/href polymorphic props (for Next.js Link), className merging via cn() utility. Single unified fix rather than piecemeal.
owner_stated_reason: Owner requested deep audit of SSR/SEO/reusability and approved the unified plan
outcome: successful — 'use client' added to all component entry points, CSS vars for colors/shadows, as/href props, cn() utility created

context: Harmonize 90 Desktop components with $desktop-* token namespace
reasoning: Desktop components were using inconsistent spacing, colors, and shadows. Needed unified $desktop-* tokens for card radius, shadows, spacing. Also harmonized header variants and product card styling.
owner_stated_reason: Owner frustrated by visual inconsistency across components
alternatives_considered: keep using mobile tokens with overrides
outcome: successful — $desktop-* token namespace, 3 header variants, 19 pages, 61 stories updated

context: Component named DesktopHeaderAliExpress in open-source library
reasoning: AliExpress is a competitor brand name. npm/GitHub exports must be brand-neutral. 'Marketplace' is generic and describes the layout style without referencing any specific brand.
owner_stated_reason: Owner flagged during review — component names must not contain competitor brands
outcome: successful — renamed to DesktopHeaderMarketplace, old name available as deprecated alias

context: Header component had hardcoded Russian text
reasoning: Open-source library must be language-neutral. Instead of i18n provider dependency for every string, expose a labels prop with typed interface. Consumers pass their own strings. Defaults provided for convenience.
owner_stated_reason: Owner corrected hardcoded Russian — components must work for any language
outcome: successful — labels prop adopted for DesktopHeaderMarketplace, pattern documented for future components

context: Multiple components need number formatting (prices, counts, ratings)
reasoning: Extracted formatNumber utility to avoid duplicating Intl.NumberFormat setup across components. Handles locale-aware grouping (1 234 567 vs 1,234,567), decimal precision, and edge cases (NaN, Infinity).
owner_stated_reason: n/a — agent technical decision during refactor
outcome: successful — shared utility created and used by DesktopHeaderMarketplace and DesktopSaleHits
